item.title: Presentations with reveal.js
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya / @rmarianoa
item.description:
Old-ôÙfashôÙioned PPôÙT's preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtions are from the 90's, and let's face it, we are in the age of the web browsôÙer. So, the last time I had to gave a talk, I deôÙcidôÙed to use a betôÙter techôÙniôÙcal supôÙport.

AfôÙter a quick search for alôÙterôÙnaôÙtives, I found many opôÙtionôÙs, inôÙcludôÙing well-ôÙknown liôÙbraries, unôÙtil I fiôÙnalôÙly deôÙcidôÙed for reôÙveal.js.

It is writôÙten in JavaScript with good CSS themes, and it does not reôÙquire exôÙpert knowlôÙedge on those techôÙnoloôÙgies. In orôÙder to play the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion, you launch an HTML file from a web browsôÙer or you can alôÙso run it with a statôÙic servôÙer.

AdôÙvanôÙtages:

  • VerôÙôÙsion conôÙtrol: GivôÙen the fact that your preôÙsenôÙôÙtaôÙôÙtion is made from source code, it is posôÙsiôÙble to track changes by usôÙing git.

  • A betôÙter cross-ôÙôÙplatôÙôÙform supôÙôÙport: it does not reôÙôÙly on a parôÙticôÙuôÙlar softôÙôÙware in a parôÙticôÙuôÙlar verôÙôÙsion to be present (web browsers are ubiqôÙuiôÙôÙtous nowaôÙôÙdays).

  • ComôÙôÙpatôÙiôÙôÙbilôÙiôÙôÙty: WYSIôÙWYG.

  • Able to host your preôÙsenôÙôÙtaôÙôÙtion in the cloud and acôÙcess it from anyôÙwhere.

ReaôÙsons to use it / nice things about it:

  • We are in 2014

  • SupôÙôÙports MarkôÙôÙdown lanôÙguage

To be clear: I am not sayôÙing that this is a betôÙter alôÙterôÙnaôÙtive beôÙcause is newôÙer of modôÙern, but beôÙcause of the adôÙvanôÙtages listôÙed. In othôÙer wordôÙs, if we count with deôÙvelôÙoped tools at our disôÙposôÙal, it would be a good idea to use them.

Here are some simôÙple and baôÙsic exôÙamôÙples of preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtions I am workôÙing on. (DISôÙCLAIMER: they might be in difôÙferôÙent lanôÙguages, and the page is in proôÙgress).
